name: com.nyakomechan.vrchat-multisim
description: In-editor multiplayer simulation for VRChat worlds. Connects ParrelSync-cloned Unity editors over localhost TCP and drives ClientSim's serialization pipeline, so synced variables, network events, ownership and player join/leave can be tested without building. Editor-only; never included in world uploads.

samples.description: UdonSharp gimmick (manual sync counter + parametrized network event) for verifying the multiplayer simulation.
